monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 5h ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
Israeli Drone Strike Kills Four in Nabatieh, Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Nabatieh, Lebanon · 13m ago. An Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, killed four people, according to the NNA, indicating continued kinetic activity in the region.
IDF Destroys Hezbollah Infrastructure in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 18m ago. The IDF destroyed Hezbollah infrastructure and seized over 150 weapons in a southern Lebanese village, escalating operations in the area.
